sourceDesc.p: Derived from CDSL MW, PWG, and PWK source records for interoperability analysis.

projectDesc.p: tei-archival-profile-v0.1; TEI is used as the archival/textual model. Raw CDSL records are preserved as escaped source-entry quotes, while selected lexical structures are promoted into TEI entry, form, sense, citation, and relation elements.

revisionDesc.change: Selected for the first 15-case validated TEI profile slice.

listBibl.head: Machine-extracted citation index; source quotes preserve the archival text.

cit.quote:
<L>1767<pc>8,3<k1>ac<k2>ac<h>1<e>1
<hom>1.</hom> <s>ac</s> ¦ (connected with √ <s>aYc</s>, <ab>q.v.</ab>) <ab>cl.</ab> 1. <ab>P.</ab> <ab>Ā.</ab> <s>a/cati</s>, <s>a/Ycati</s>, <s>˚te</s>, <s>AnaYca</s>, <s>˚ce</s>, to go, move, tend;
<div n="to"/>to honour;
<div n="to"/>to make round or curved;
<div n="to"/>to request, ask, <ls>L.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to speak indistinctly, <ls>L.</ls>
<div n="1"/>(also) to adorn, <ls>Dharmaś.</ls><info n="sup"/>
<div n="1"/>See <hom>2.</hom> <s>acita</s>, <s>a/cizwu</s>.<info whitneyroots="ac,1"/><info verb="genuineroot" cp="1P,1Ā"/>
<LEND>

<L>791<pc>1-0059<k1>ac<k2>ac
{#ac#}¦, {#aYc, a/cati#}
<ls>NAIGH. 2,14.</ls> {#a/Ycati, ˚te; AnaYca, ˚Yce; aYcitA#}
<ls>P. 8,4,58</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab>
<div n="1"> 1) {%gehen%},
<ls>DHĀTUP. 7,6.</ls> <ls n="DHĀTUP.">21,2.</ls> <ls>VOP. 8,58.</ls> {#svatantrA kaTamaYcasi#}
<ls>BHAṬṬ. 4,22.</ls> {#vAmamAnaYcuryajYiyA mfgAH#}
<ls n="BHAṬṬ.">14,99.</ls> {#devAnaYcati, vizvagaYcati, sahAYcati, tiro 'Ycati#}
<ls>AK. 3,1,34.</ls>
<ls>H. 444.</ls> {#a/cati = gatikarman#}
<ls>NAIGH. 2,14.</ls> {#avyAt#}
<ls>VOP. 8,58.</ls> {#akta#}
<ls n="VOP.">26,102.</ls> {#aNgeti kzipranAmAYcitamevANkitaM Bavati#}
<ls>NIR. 5,17.</ls> {#acita#}
(<ls>DURGA</ls>: {#gata#})
<ls n="NIR.">11,25.</ls>
<div n="1">— 2) {%ehren%}
<ls>DHĀTUP. 7,6.</ls> {#aYcita#} und {#aYcitvA#}
<ls>P. 6,4,30.</ls> <ls n="P.">7,2,53.</ls>
<ls>VOP. 26,102.</ls> {#aYcyAt#}
<ls n="VOP.">8,41.</ls> <ls n="VOP. 8,">58.</ls> {#aYcita#} {%geehrt%}
<ls>AK. 3,2,47.</ls>
<ls>H. 447.</ls> {%ausgezeichnet, ausserordentlich%}: {#aYcitAByAM gatAByAm#} ({%Gang%})
<ls>RAGH. 2,18.</ls> {#aYcitavikrama#}
<ls n="RAGH.">9,24.</ls> {%geziert (?)%}: {#vaktraM svedakaRAYcitam#} (<ab>Schol.</ab> = {#vyAptam#})
<ls>AMAR. 78.</ls>
<div n="1">— 3) {%biegen, krümmen%}: {#aNgulIH — acate — AYcanta#}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 3,4,3,2</ls>-<ls n="ŚAT. BR. 3,4,3,">5.</ls> <ls>KĀTY. ŚR. 7,3,7.</ls> <ls>NIR. 5,28.</ls> {#Siro 'YcitvA#}
<ls>BHAṬṬ. 9,40.</ls> {#aYcita#} {%gebogen%}
<ls>NIR. 5,25.</ls> {#sudIrGAYcitalANgUlAH (plavaMgamAH)#}
<ls>R. 6,3,43.</ls> <ls n="R.">5,65,14.</ls>
<ls>BHAṬṬ. 9,40.</ls> {#mattasiMhAYcitaskanDa#}
<ls>R. 6,29,12.</ls> {#dfptasiMharzaBAYcitaM vIkzya rAmam#}
<ls n="R.">4,13,29.</ls> {#pInAYcitaguruSroRI#}
<ls n="R.">5,18,25.</ls> {#aYcitasavyajAnu#}
<ls>RAGH. 18,50.</ls> {#aYcitadakziRoru#}
<ls>BHAṬṬ. 2,31.</ls> {#netrayugalaM lIlAYcitaBrUlatam#}
<ls>ŚĀK. CH. 128,15.</ls> {#aYcitapadmAkzaM muKam#}
<ls>MBH. 1,7703</ls> (<ls>SUND. 3,25</ls>: {#aYcitapatrAkzaM)#}.{# pfTucArvaYcitekzaRa#}
<ls>N. 12,32.</ls> {#aYcitAkzipakzman#}
<ls>RAGH. 5,76.</ls> (<ab>Sch.</ab> {#aYcita = sundara)#}.{# SItkArAYcitalocanA#}
<ls>AMAR. 32.</ls>
<div n="1">— 4) {%verlangen, fordern%}
<ls>DHĀTUP. 21,2.</ls>
<div n="1">— 5) {%murmeln, undeutlich sprechen%} <ab>ebend.</ab> <ab>v. l.</ab>
<div n="v">— <ab>Vgl.</ab> {#aYcay#} .
<div n="p">— {#apa#} {%wegdrücken, wegtreiben%}: {#apA\mitrA\~ apA\cito^ ace\taH#}
<ls>ṚV. 9,97,54.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#A#} {%biegen, krümmen%}: {#AcyA\ jAnu^#}
<ls>ṚV. 9,15,16.</ls> {#dakziRaM jAnvAcya#}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 2,4,2,1.</ls>
<ls>ĀŚV. GṚHY. 1,21.</ls> {#i\zva\grARyAYca/tu#}
<ls>AV. 11,12,16.</ls> {#jAnvAkna/#} {%mit gebogenem Knie%}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 3,2,1,5.</ls> (<ab>u.</ab> {#akna#} ist dieses Beispiel zu streichen).
<div n="p">— {#ud#} {%aufheben, in die Höhe ziehen%}: {#ma\hAnta\M koSa\muda^cA\ ni zi^Yca#}
<ls>ṚV. 5,83,8.</ls>
<ls>VS. 10,19.</ls> {#ekEkameva pAdamudacya tizWati (aSvaH)#}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 5,1,4,5.</ls> {#pUrRAtpUrRamudacyate#}
(<ls>ŚAṂK.</ls>: {#udricyate, udgacCati#})
<ls>BṚH.</ls> <ls>AR. UP. 5,1.</ls> {#udaktamudakaM kUpAt#}
<ls>P. 7,2,53</ls>, <ls>Sch. 8,2,48</ls>,
<ab>Sch.</ab>
<ls>VOP. 26,91.</ls> {#udaYcitAkzaH#}
<ls>BHAṬṬ. 2,31.</ls>
<div n="1">— 2) {%ausstossen, ertönen lassen%}: {#harim — anugAyati kAcidudaYcitapaYcamarAgam#}
<ls>GĪT. 1,39.</ls>
<div n="v">— <ab>Vgl.</ab> {#udAca#} .
<div n="p">— {#upa#} {%schöpfen%} (Wasser): {#aYjalinApa upAcati#}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 13,8,4,5.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#ni#} {%niederbiegen%}: {#aNgulIH — nyacati#}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 3,1,3,25.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR. 3,">2,1,36.</ls> {#nya^knANguli#}
<ls n="ŚAT. BR.">3,2,1,6.</ls> auch {#nya^kta#}
<ls n="ŚAT. BR.">1,6,3,17.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR. 1,">7,1,1.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR.">3,3,4,10.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR. 3,">5,2,18.</ls>
<div n="v">— <ab>Vgl.</ab> {#nyAca#} .
<div n="p">— {#pari#} {%umwenden, drehen%}: {#a\haM tazwe^va va\nDura\M parya^cAmi hf\dA ma\tim#} {%cogitationes volvo%}
<ls>ṚV. 10,119,5.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#vi#}
<div n="1"> 1) {%auseinander drängen, — biegen%}: {#mA\yABi^raSvinA yu\vaM vf\kzaM saM ca\ vi cA^caTaH#}
<ls>ṚV. 5,78,6.</ls> {#saM ca\ vi cA^cyase#}
<ls>AV. 4,49,2.</ls>
<div n="1">— 2) {%ausweiten, ausbreiten%}: {#agne\ vya^casva\ roda^sI urU\cI#}
<ls>AV. 3,3,1.</ls> {#utsa\makzi^taM vya\cyamA^naM sali\lasya^ pf\zWe#}
<ls n="AV.">18,4,36.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#sam#}
<div n="1"> 1) {%zusammendrängen%}: {#sama^cyanta vf\janA^#}
<ls>ṚV. 5,54,12</ls>; <ab>vgl.</ab> auch unter {#vi#} .
<div n="1">— 2) {%zusammenbiegen%}: {#aNgulIH samacya#}
<ab>Sch.</ab> zu <ls>ŚAT. BR. 3,3,2,14.</ls> {#samakna#} {%gebogen%}: {#samaknO SakuneH pAdO#}
<ls>P. 8,2,48</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab>
<ls>VOP. 26,90.</ls>
<LEND>

<L>1095<pc>1-013-b<k1>ac<k2>ac √{#ac#}¦ {#aYc, a/cati, ˚te, a/Ycati, ˚te#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%biegen%}. {#aYcita#} {%gebogen; kraus, lockig%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%gehen%}. {#saMkocamaYcati tvayi#} (<ab>d. i.</ab> {#sarasi#}) {%kommen in, theilhaft werden%} <ls>Spr. 7734</ls>. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%verfahren, zu Werke gehen%} <ls>Comm. zu TBR. 2,1,4,3</ls>. <div n="1">— 4〉 {%in ehren halten%}. {#aYcita#} {%ausgezeichnet, ausserordentlich%}. <div n="1">— 5〉 {#aYcitam#} <lex>Adv.</lex> {%behutsam, aufmerksam%}. — {#˚Ycita#} häufig fehlerhaft für {#˚cita#} ({#ci#} mit {#A#}). <div n="m">— <ab>Caus.</ab> {#aYcayati#} {%erregen, bewirken%} <ls>GĪT. 10,11</ls>. <div n="p">— Mit {#anu#} {%nachgehen, folgen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#apa#} {%fortdrängen, vertreiben%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#ava#}, <ab>Partic.</ab> {#avAYcita#} {%gesenkt%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#A#} {%biegen, krümmen%}. <ab>Absol.</ab> {#A/cya#} <ls n="Chr.">37,28</ls>. <ab>Partic.</ab> {#Akna#}. <div n="p">— Mit {#ud#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%aufheben, in die Höhe ziehen; ausschöpfen, leeren%}. <ab>Partic.</ab> {#udakta#}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%erregen, bewirken%} <ls>PRASANNAR. 136,1</ls> <ab>v. u.</ab> <div n="1">— 3〉 {%sich erheben%} <ls>BĀLAR. 203,8</ls>. {%ertönen%}. <div n="m">— <ab>Caus.</ab> <div n="1">— 1〉 {%in die Höhe ziehen; erheben%} <ls>BĀLAR. 208,4</ls>. <ab>v. u.</ab> <div n="1">— 2〉 {%ertönen lassen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#vyud#} <ab>Caus.</ab> ({#˚aYcayati#}) {%erheben%} <ls>VIDDH. 76,13</ls>. <div n="p">— Mit {#samud#} {%in die Höhe heben%}. <ab>Partic.</ab> {#amudakta#}. <div n="m">— <ab>Caus.</ab> {#˚aYcayati#} {%erregen, bewirken%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#upa#} {%schöpfen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#ni#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%niederbiegen%}. <ab>Partic.</ab> {#nya/kta#} und {#nya^kna#}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%sich beugen, sich senken, herabhängen%} <ls>BĀLAR. 64,2</ls>. <ab>v. u.</ab> <ls n="BĀLAR.">204,4. 208,3</ls>. <ab>v. u.</ab> <div n="p">— Mit {#upani#} [Page1-013-c] {%hinbiegen%} <ls>ŚAT. BR. 11,4,2,4</ls>. <div n="p">— Mit {#pari#} {%herumbiegen, umwenden%} <ls n="Chr.">19,4</ls>. <div n="p">— Mit {#prati#} <ab>Pass.</ab> {%sich anschliessen an%} <ls>AIT. ĀR. 1,4,1</ls>. <ab>Partic.</ab> {#pratyaYcita#} {%geehrt%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#vi#} {%auseinanderbiegen; ausweiten, ausbreiten%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#sam#} {%zusammenbiegen, zusammendrängen%}. <ab>Partic.</ab> {#samakna#}. <LEND>
